summary: Verified all P0 Code Review #2 fixes (backend defensive variable init, sessionStorage removal, 2FA-via-cookie, Dashboard/ProjectsTab hook refactor). 6/6 backend tests passed (1 skipped because /auth/forgot-password does not expose the reset token in the response — covered the bad-token decode path instead). Playwright run reports 0 console errors and 0 render-loop warnings.

minor.issue: Token is not surfaced in response body, so a true happy-path reset cannot be exercised end-to-end from a black-box test. The bad-token branch (which still exercises the defensive `payload` init in decode_password_reset_token) is verified. Consider exposing the token only when `APP_ENV != production` to allow e2e coverage.

critical_code_review_comments: auth_utils.decode_password_reset_token: the defensive `payload: dict = {}` is fine, but the cleaner idiom is to simply `return jwt.decode(...)` inside the try and remove the post-try `payload.get('prt')` check (move that into the try block). Current shape is safe but unidiomatic.

server.py codes/file endpoint catches all exceptions and reflects the error string into the 500 detail — consider redacting the inner message to avoid leaking filesystem details (low risk because the endpoint is operator-gated).

Login.jsx still calls saveToken(data.token) on the success path. Since the session cookie is httpOnly and `withCredentials: true` is the canonical transport, storing the token in JS state/localStorage continues to be a XSS vector. The pending_2fa branch was fixed, but the main login branch (line 31) should be audited too if the intent is to move fully off JS-accessible tokens.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (no console errors, no warnings, all flows reachable)

test_credentials: Operator rac.investments.swe@gmail.com / 123Admin@98 (boots with 2FA cleared, lands on /setup-2fa). Fresh users registered in tests use TEST_<uuid>@example.com with password TempPass!2345 / OrigPass!2345.
seed_data_creation: Each test class registers its own throwaway TEST_<uuid>@example.com user; no fixture-level seeding required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes for Code Review #2 are verified. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_p0_review.py is the regression suite. The pending_2fa branch of Login.jsx was not exercised in the browser (operator boots without TOTP enabled), but the backend cookie-verify flow is end-to-end covered in TestTwoFactorCookieVerify. If you need the browser-side pending_2fa screenshot, register a fresh user from /register, complete /setup-2fa, log out via /logout, then log back in.
rca of the issue: N/A — this was a verification pass, no bugs were found.
